title: Cost Control in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger cost control in practice judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Cost Control in Practice is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Cost Control in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good cost control in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Cost Control in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
